response.justification: The candidate possesses extensive experience as a full-stack software engineer but entirely lacks the specialized hardware and AI infrastructure background required for this role. There is no evidence of SoC modeling, GPU architecture experience, or deep-learning hardware optimization.
strengths: Meets the baseline timeline requirement for years of professional experience (BS + over 8 years).
Demonstrated experience in building low-latency systems and asynchronous I/O using DLang.
Strong background in software system architecture and high-traffic microservices.
concerns: Complete lack of experience with SoC and IP modeling or hardware-software co-design.
No background in deep neural network training, inference optimization, or AI accelerators.
Missing required knowledge of GPU architectures, SIMD, and MIMD.
